originalAlarm.description: Value stored to 'k_crcs' is never read

reasoning: 5275b1e49f6.c L21: k_crcs dead store. The value assigned to k_crcs at L21 is never subsequently read (overwritten or not used). PC=CONFIG_FEATURE_INSMOD_VERSION_CHECKING=T correctly constrains the condition. No library macros. New bug. Consistent with TRANSFORMATION_40 (TRUE_NEW_OVER with library macros); PRODUCT version is correctly constrained.
